Log:
  - Update to 5.0.6
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  
  PR:		185593
  Submitted by:	clutton <clutton@zoho.com>

Modified:

Modified: head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile	Fri Jan 17 14:09:01 2014	(r340039)
+++ head/www/xpi-ghostery/Makefile	Fri Jan 17 14:09:17 2014	(r340040)
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ghostery
-PORTVERSION=	5.0.4
-DISTVERSIONSUFFIX=-fx+an
+PORTVERSION=	5.0.6
+DISTVERSIONSUFFIX= -an+fx
 CATEGORIES=	www
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	clutton@zoho.com
 COMMENT=	Alerts/Block web bugs, ad and widgets
 
 XPI_NUM=	9609
